name: HR relocation policy example
answer:
Employees may request relocation support before moving.
Employees receive up to $5,000 for an approved relocation.
Employees receive a guaranteed home-sale reimbursement.

sources.title: HR Relocation Policy
sources.content:
Employees may request relocation support before moving.
Approved relocations are reimbursed up to $3,000 after receipts are submitted.
Relocation support requires manager and People Operations approval.
